rules.name: project-metadata-frontmatter-schema-edit
rules.evidence: `index.md` — YAML frontmatter (title, date, location, coordinates, type, tags, featured, authors) + Markdown body

rules.name: project-metadata-frontmatter-schema-write
rules.evidence: `index.md` — YAML frontmatter (title, date, location, coordinates, type, tags, featured, authors) + Markdown body

always_on: Project overview: microfolio is a static portfolio generator built with SvelteKit 2, Svelte 5, and Tailwind CSS 4, using a file-based Markdown+YAML CMS, developed by AKER.
Available development commands (pnpm dev/build/deploy/preview/lint/format/optimize-images/clean-images) and tooling requirements (pnpm 9.12.0, Node.js 20+, no test framework configured).

Content system layout: projects live in /content/projects/{slug}/ with index.md, thumbnail.jpg (optional thumbnail.webp), and images/videos/documents subdirectories; homepage content is /content/index.md and about page is /content/about.md.

Data loading architecture: all routes use server-side +page.server.js loaders reading content from the filesystem at build time, with specific loaders listed per route (homepage, projects, project detail, list/map/about).
Content parsing pattern: split on ---, parse YAML with the yaml package, convert Markdown with marked.

Key utility modules and their roles: paths.js (getBasePath), projects.js (loadProjects), imageMetadata.js (EXIF/IPTC extraction), config.js (site config), i18n.js (svelte-i18n setup with en/fr active).
Styling setup: Tailwind CSS 4 configured in src/app.css with typography plugin, custom theme in theme.css, dark mode via prefers-color-scheme, IBM Plex Sans font loaded from bunny.net CDN.
Datatable components (Datatable, Search, ThSort, ThFilter, Pagination, RowCount, RowsPerPage) power the /list view using @vincjo/datatables.

Build & deployment details: static site generation via @sveltejs/adapter-static (output /build), svelte.config.js dynamically generates prerender entries by scanning /content/projects/, vite.config.js copies content/ to build output via vite-plugin-static-copy (build only), icons via unplugin-icons, base path is /microfolio in production (empty in dev, removable via CUSTOM_DOMAIN=true), and +layout.js sets prerender=true and trailingSlash='always'.
Internationalization setup: locale strings live in src/lib/locales/{lang}.json, default locale is set in $lib/config.js, and RTL support in +layout.svelte auto-detects and sets the dir attribute.
